description: Sector overlay for French audiovisual, broadcasting, publishing, digital media, advertising, accessibility, creation-support, and platform/content-governance documentation.

metadata.scope: France-only sector overlay controls for Media. Intended to be used with france_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official French/EU legal, regulatory, supervisory, and guidance sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Arcom audiovisual and digital communication regulation
Arcom accessibility obligations for audiovisual media services

rules.title: Arcom authorization, declaration, or audiovisual-service evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for Arcom, audiovisual service, editor/distributor status, channel authorization, radio frequency, or declaration evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this sector control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Content standards, pluralism, or moderation evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for pluralism, protection of minors, hate-speech, content moderation, editorial responsibility, or signalement controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this sector control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Audiovisual accessibility evidence is present where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for accessibility, subtitles, audio description, accessible app/site, or services giving access to audiovisual content.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this sector control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Arcom accessibility obligations for audiovisual media services

rules.title: Creation, production, quota, or rights-protection evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for French/European work quotas, production investment, copyright, neighbouring rights, lawful offer, or music quota evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this sector control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
